pi_items.source: export_result.sh allows solid shadow (shadow_mask_solid) and hardcodes has_alpha_pixels=True

privileged_info_summary: The task requires opening the real OpenToonz sample animation '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and applying a drop shadow effect. The output directory is correctly set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/shadow/'. While the metadata claims 10 frames are required, the verifier awards full points for 5 or more frames. The shadow must be offset to the bottom-right (+X, +Y). Despite the description requesting a semi-transparent shadow and PNG alpha channel, the verifier explicitly accepts solid shadows and does not rigorously check for alpha channel transparency.
